sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) a palm-tree, Phœnix dactylifera (Arab. تَمَرُ id.) Joe 1:12 Son 7:9, plur. Exo 15:27. עִיר הַתְּמָרִים the city of palm-trees, see under עִיר .

(2) [Tamar], pr.n.-(a) of a town situated in the southern borders of Palestine, Eze 47:19 48:28 .-(b) i.q. תַּדְמֹר Palmyra (which see), 1Ki 9:18 כתיב.-(c) f.-(α) the daughter-in-law of Judah, Gen 38:6.-(β) a daughter of David, 2Sa 13:1.-(γ) a daughter of Absalom, 2Sa 14:27.
